title: Curation-QA audit pass on the research card set (faithfulness >= 95%)
context: An independent sampled curation-QA audit confirms the shipped research cards faithfully represent their sources (>= 95%) and that license, allowlist, and provenance coverage are complete, with any failures fixed or cards withheld. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Run an independent sampled curation-QA audit on the research card set confirming >= 95% faithfulness and 100% license + allowlist + provenance coverage, fixing or withholding failures and recording the results.
acceptanceCriteria: Independent sampled audit confirms >= 95% faithfulness; license + allowlist + provenance coverage = 100%
Any failures fixed or cards withheld; results recorded (domain + compliance reviewers; TO BE SECURED)
